brief_justification: Correct answer (Yes) with valid causal reasoning; Multi-level analysis covering DAG structure, interventional vs observational equivalence for root nodes, and algebraic derivation of the linear relationship; Some self-monitoring via suppression signals and noting the critical structural fact about root nodes, but no explicit bias-checking; Strong verification through algebraic derivation showing the -0.09 coefficient and computing baseline probability; Acknowledges this is a hypothetical world and notes the observational=interventional equivalence condition, but doesn't discuss uncertainty; Implicitly addresses the alternative (could confounders matter?) by proving V is a root node, but doesn't systematically evaluate other interpretations; Complete audit trail from DAG specification through each computational step to final conclusion
